title: Crucifix Totem
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a Crucifix!
body:
As said, This pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a crucifix, and also changes the name of the item to of course, Crucifix.

### NOTE: You should be able to use this pack in pretty much any version of Minecraft with totems. Ignore the message telling you it's incompatible.

![The item being used in-game.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a9cc9228eb05e50f41b53caea7bd1bc121a2ce4_0.webp)

How it looks being held: (with shaders again)
![The item being held](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdfc411f7fd3b593e45e6d404ae12b792e729b30_0.webp)

Disclaimer; This is not promoting religion in any way. This is only for people who simply enjoy the retexture for the item, and it would've been called "Cross Totem" if that wasn't already too similar to another user's creation on here.
